objectives.title: Cross Mt. Moon And Reach Cerulean
objectives.summary: Leave Pewter, cross Route 3 and Mt. Moon, and emerge into Cerulean City.
objectives.completion_predicate: The current map reaches Cerulean City, Route 24, Route 25, or Bill's House.
failure_hints: Prefer exits and warp landmarks in Mt. Moon over wide freehand exploration.
Short route cards beat long blind action chains in caves.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save after reaching Cerulean City or the Route 24 bridge area.
objectives.route_hint: Move east from Pewter through Route 3, then chain cave exits through Mt. Moon until Cerulean.

objectives.title: Reach Bill And Get The S.S. Ticket
objectives.summary: Travel through Cerulean and Routes 24/25 to Bill's House, then finish the dialog chain to obtain the S.S. Ticket.
objectives.completion_predicate: The bag contains the S.S. Ticket.
failure_hints: On the bridge and cape routes, use frontier cards to keep moving north/east instead of circling trainers.
At Bill's House, clear dialog patiently; the ticket comes from interaction, not roaming.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save after the S.S. Ticket is received.
objectives.route_hint: Head to Route 24 and Route 25, enter Bill's House, and finish the interaction sequence.

objectives.title: Head To Vermilion With The Ticket
objectives.summary: With the S.S. Ticket secured, route south and east toward Vermilion City and the harbor.
objectives.completion_predicate: The current map reaches Vermilion City, Vermilion Dock, or the S.S. Anne exterior.
failure_hints: Favor exits and route landmarks over re-clearing Cerulean interiors.
If you lose the path, use saved landmark knowledge and avoid recently failed branches.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save once Vermilion City or the dock is reached.
objectives.route_hint: Leave Cerulean, route toward Vermilion, and reach the harbor with the S.S. Ticket.

objectives.title: Board The S.S. Anne
objectives.summary: Use the ticket to reach the ship and move inside toward the captain route.
objectives.completion_predicate: The current map is any interior S.S. Anne map.
failure_hints: Treat the dock and ship entry as warp landmarks and re-observe after each transition.
Do not wander Vermilion once the ticket objective is live.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save after boarding the S.S. Anne cleanly.
objectives.route_hint: Reach Vermilion Dock, use the ticket, and board the ship.

objectives.title: Get HM01 From The Captain
objectives.summary: Navigate the S.S. Anne interior, reach the captain, and finish the interaction that grants HM01 Cut.
failure_hints: Inside the ship, route cards and landmark exits are more reliable than freehand room wandering.
At the captain, clear the dialog chain patiently and avoid overlong menu batches.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save immediately after HM01 is obtained.
objectives.route_hint: Climb through the S.S. Anne interior, find the captain's room, and finish the captain interaction.

objectives.title: Pack Complete: Cut Access
objectives.summary: HM01 Cut is secured. Stabilize the run and prepare the next progression pack.
failure_hints: Keep a durable save after receiving HM01 before attempting the next badge route.
objectives.route_hint: Save, stabilize, and prepare the next pack.
